Hi

Another thought developed by my brother to celebrate this holiday.

From: Larry Kirson glalarry@optonline.net
To: Steve Kirson skir3@msn.com
Subject: MLK Day
Date: Mon, 21 Jan 2008 08:47:35 -0500

On this day when we commemorate the life and legacy of this great man,
reflect for a moment on all the things he stood for�

�He stood for 3 days at a Holiday Inn in Lansing, MI
�He stood for 5 days at a Marriott in East Hanover, NJ
�He stood for 7 days at a Hilton in Instanbul, Turkey

The world�s most misunder-stood man.
